title: Uncommonly Fluffy Canadian Chicken Casserole
description: A weeknight Canadian dish featuring apricot and fluffy texture, made with kosher-friendly ingredients, this casserole is perfect for a family dinner.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large skillet, cook the chicken in manteca over medium heat until browned.
In a separate saucepan, whisk together the flour and milk, then bring to a boil and cook until thickened.
Add the chicken broth, apricot jam, salt, and pepper to the saucepan and stir to combine.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked chicken, sauce mixture, and frozen peas and carrots.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and top with shredded cheddar cheese.
Bake for 35 minutes or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Let the casserole rest for 10 minutes before serving.
